CREATE TABLE test_tuple (id INT, data Tuple(INT, String, Float32));
SELECT tupleElement(data, 1) AS first_element FROM test_tuple WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleElement(data, 2) AS second_element FROM test_tuple WHERE tupleElement(data, 1) > 15;
SELECT id, tupleElement(data, 3) AS third_element FROM test_tuple WHERE tupleElement(data, 1) IN (SELECT tupleElement(data, 1) FROM test_tuple WHERE id < 3);
CREATE TABLE another_table AS SELECT id, data FROM test_tuple;
SELECT a.id, tupleElement(b.data, 1) AS first_element FROM test_tuple AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, tupleElement(data, 2) AS name FROM test_tuple WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_tuple WHERE tupleElement(data, 1) = 20);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_tuple WHERE tupleElement(data, 3) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, AVG(tupleElement(data, 3)) AS average_float FROM test_tuple GROUP BY id HAVING average_float > 1.5;
